pageTypes.name: article
pageTypes.editableElements: .klar-article-2025-title:field(title:Title, name:title, type:string, order:1, section:Content, sectionOrder:1), .klar-article-2025-dek:field(title:Excerpt, name:excerpt, type:text, order:2, section:Content, options(layout:editor)), .klar-article-2025-cover:field(title:Cover image, name:coverImage, type:image, order:3, section:Content), .klar-article-2025-body:field(title:Article body, name:body, type:array, order:4, section:Content, options(layout:blocks)), .klar-article-2025-category:field(title:Category, name:category, type:string, order:1, col:6, section:Meta, sectionOrder:2, options(vocab:article-categories)), .klar-article-2025-published:field(title:Published date, name:publishedDate, type:string, format:date, default:now, order:2, col:6, section:Meta, options(dateFormat:'MMMM D, YYYY')), .klar-article-2025-read-time:field(title:'Read time', name:readTime, type:string, default:'8 min read', order:3, col:6, section:Meta), .klar-article-2025-author-name:field(title:Author, name:authorName, type:string, order:4, col:6, section:Meta, options(vocab:article-authors)), .klar-article-2025-author-role:field(title:'Author role', name:authorRole, type:string, order:5, col:6, section:Meta), .klar-article-2025-author-avatar:field(title:'Author initials', name:authorInitials, type:string, order:6, col:6, section:Meta), :field(title:Tags, name:tags, type:array, order:7, section:Meta, options(vocab:article-tags))

content.title: How high-velocity teams make better roadmap decisions
content.excerpt: A practical guide to turning customer signals, revenue risk, and engineering capacity into sharper product bets without slowing your team down.

coverImage.alt: Product team reviewing a roadmap dashboard together

pageTypes.name: blog-post
pageTypes.editableElements:
.blog-post__title:field(title:Title, name:title, type:string, order:1, section:Content, sectionOrder:1),
.blog-post__excerpt:field(title:Excerpt, name:excerpt, type:text, order:2, section:Content, options(layout:editor)),
.blog-post__cover:field(title:Cover image, name:coverImage, type:image, order:3, section:Content),
.blog-post__body:field(title:Body, name:body, type:array, order:4, section:Content, options(layout:blocks)),
.blog-post__category:field(title:Category, name:category, type:string, order:1, col:6, section:Meta, sectionOrder:2, options(vocab:blog-categories)),
.blog-post__date:field(title:Published date, name:publishedDate, type:string, format:date, default:now, order:2, col:6, section:Meta, options(dateFormat:'MMMM D, YYYY')),
.blog-post__read-time:field(title:'Read time', name:readTime, type:string, default:'6 min read', order:3, col:6, section:Meta),
.blog-post__author-name:field(title:Author, name:author, type:string, order:4, col:6, section:Meta, options(vocab:blog-authors)),
:field(title:Tags, name:tags, type:array, order:5, section:Meta, options(vocab:blog-tags))

content.title: How focused product teams turn noisy signals into better roadmap decisions
content.excerpt: A practical guide to connecting customer feedback, revenue risk, team capacity, and strategic intent before choosing what to ship next.

coverImage.alt: Product team reviewing a roadmap in a modern workspace

content.author: Sofia Chen
